_comment: Copy to paycor.local.json (gitignored) and fill from the Paycor Developer Portal. Auth = OAuth client_credentials. base_v2 handles employees/departments; base_v1 handles per-employee payroll sub-resources (payrates/earnings/taxes/deductions). legal_entity_id is required (no /me in this API).
scope: <the exact 'cc[CompanyID] ScopeName' string from the app General tab>
